# Packages for exporting editable vector plots to PowerPoint
for (pkg in c("officer", "rvg")) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages(pkg, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
}
library(officer)
library(rvg)

# Helper: save a plot as an editable vector slide in PowerPoint.
# Uses dml(code = print(...)) so it handles composite plots (risk tables, patchwork).
# Output lives in figures-ppt/ and is copied into _site/ by Quarto (see _quarto.yml resources).
save_plot_pptx <- function(plot_obj, name, width = 10, height = 6) {
  dir.create("figures-ppt", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  path <- file.path("figures-ppt", paste0(name, ".pptx"))
  # Force the plot into a local variable so the code block is self-contained
  local_plot <- plot_obj
  doc <- read_pptx()
  doc <- add_slide(doc, layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme")
  doc <- ph_with(doc,
                 dml(code = print(local_plot)),
                 location = ph_location(left = 0.25, top = 0.25,
                                        width = width, height = height))
  print(doc, target = path)
  invisible(path)
}

# Cleaned master produced by the data management pipeline (see data_management.qmd)

  "Final cohort/final_master_0114_raw.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(across(contains("date"), as.Date))

  mutate(across(contains("date"), as.Date))

# ICI class reference
ici_class <- read_excel("ICI CKD/final_master_1229.xlsx") %>%
  select(EMPI, ICI_Class)

title: Kavita ICI CKD — Analysis
text:
3.0 Distribution check for continuous variables
Before choosing summary statistics for Table 1, assess whether age_ici, pre_CRE_180days (baseline creatinine), and eGFR_CRE_baseline are approximately normal. With N ≈ 17,700 the Shapiro-Wilk test is not applicable (N > 5000), so we rely on visual distribution + skewness / kurtosis.


Show code
check_vars <- c("age_ici", "pre_CRE_180days", "eGFR_CRE_baseline")
diag_df <- final_master %>%
  select(all_of(check_vars)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.)))))

dist_stats <- purrr::map_dfr(check_vars, function(v) {
  x <- diag_df[[v]]; x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  data.frame(
    Variable         = v,
    N                = length(x),
    Mean             = round(mean(x), 2),
    SD               = round(sd(x), 2),
    Median           = round(median(x), 2),
    `Q1 - Q3`        = paste0(round(quantile(x, 0.25), 2), " - ",
                              round(quantile(x, 0.75), 2)),
    Skewness         = round(moments::skewness(x), 2),
    `Kurtosis (excess)` = round(moments::kurtosis(x) - 3, 2),
    check.names = FALSE
  )
})
knitr::kable(dist_stats,
             caption = "Distribution statistics. |Skewness| < 0.5 = approximately normal; 0.5 to 1 = mild skew; > 1 = strongly skewed.")

Show code
make_plots <- function(x, lab) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  d <- data.frame(x = x)
  p1 <- ggplot(d, aes(x)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "#4C72B0", color = "white") +
    labs(title = paste0("Histogram — ", lab), x = lab, y = "Count") +
    theme_classic()
  p2 <- ggplot(d, aes(sample = x)) +
    stat_qq(color = "#4C72B0", alpha = 0.4, size = 0.5) +
    stat_qq_line(color = "red", linewidth = 0.6) +
    labs(title = paste0("Q-Q plot — ", lab),
         x = "Theoretical quantiles", y = "Sample quantiles") +
    theme_classic()
  p1 | p2
}

(make_plots(diag_df$age_ici,           "Age at ICI start (years)")) /
(make_plots(diag_df$pre_CRE_180days,   "Baseline creatinine (mg/dL)")) /
(make_plots(diag_df$eGFR_CRE_baseline, "Baseline eGFR (mL/min/1.73m²)"))

section: 4.1 Time from ICI to the primary composite outcome
text:
4.1 Time from ICI to the primary composite outcome
Among patients who experienced the CKD composite outcome, the distribution of time from first ICI dose to event:


Show code
events_df <- final_master %>%
  filter(ckd_composite == 1,
         !is.na(time_to_ckd_composite),
         time_to_ckd_composite >= 0)

tto_stats <- events_df %>%
  summarise(
    N      = dplyr::n(),
    Median = round(median(time_to_ckd_composite)),
    Q1     = round(quantile(time_to_ckd_composite, 0.25)),
    Q3     = round(quantile(time_to_ckd_composite, 0.75)),
    Min    = round(min(time_to_ckd_composite)),
    Max    = round(max(time_to_ckd_composite))
  )

knitr::kable(
  tto_stats,
  caption = "Days from first ICI dose to primary composite outcome (among patients with an event)."

title: Kavita ICI CKD — Analysis
text:
4.2 CIF curve (CKD composite vs death)


Show code
# Curves-only version — saved to PPT as editable vector
p_cif_overall_curves <- cuminc(Surv(time_to_ckd_cmp, status_ckd_cmp) ~ 1,
                               data = final_master) %>%
  ggcuminc(outcome = c("CKD Composite", "Death")) +
  add_confidence_interval() +
  labs(x = "Years", y = "Cumulative Incidence") +
  scale_ggsurvfit() +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 365 * 5, by = 365),
    labels = 0:5,
    limits = c(0, 365 * 5)
  )

# Display version — includes risk table
p_cif_overall_curves + add_risktable()

title: Kavita ICI CKD — Analysis
text:
10.1 By Diabetes Status


Show code
final_master_dm <- final_master %>%
  mutate(dm_label = factor(dm, levels = c(0, 1),
                           labels = c("No Diabetes", "Diabetes")))

p_cif_dm_curves <- cuminc(Surv(time_to_ckd_cmp_year, status_ckd_cmp) ~ dm_label,
                          data = final_master_dm) %>%
  ggcuminc(outcome = "CKD Composite") +
  add_confidence_interval() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Diabetes" = "#619CFF", "No Diabetes" = "#F8766D")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("Diabetes" = "#619CFF", "No Diabetes" = "#F8766D")) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 5)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1),
    limits = c(0, 5),
    expand = c(0.02, 0)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Years since Baseline",
       y = "Cumulative Incidence",
       title = "CIF of CKD Composite by DM Status (5-year view)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "bottom",
    axis.text.x       = element_text(size = 8),
    panel.grid.major  = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor  = element_blank()
  )

# Display with risk table
p_cif_dm_curves +
  add_risktable(
    times           = seq(0, 5, by = 1),
    risktable_stats = c("n.risk", "cum.event"),
    stats_label     = list(n.risk = "At Risk", cum.event = "Events")
  )









Show code
save_plot_pptx(p_cif_dm_curves, "cif-by-dm", width = 11, height = 7)

title: ICI → CKD Cohort Study
text:
This site publishes the Quarto pipeline for a retrospective cohort study examining chronic kidney disease (CKD) outcomes following immune checkpoint inhibitor (ICI) therapy.
The pipeline has two stages:



Stage
File
Role




Data management
data_management.qmd
Load raw ICI starts + RPDR files, derive demographics, comorbidities, labs, eGFR trajectories, CKD / ESKD / AKI outcomes, competing-risk status

title: ICI → CKD Cohort Study
text:
This site publishes the Quarto pipeline for a retrospective cohort study examining chronic kidney disease (CKD) outcomes following immune checkpoint inhibitor (ICI) therapy.
The pipeline has two stages:



Stage

Data management

Load raw ICI starts + RPDR files, derive demographics, comorbidities, labs, eGFR trajectories, CKD / ESKD / AKI outcomes, competing-risk status

title: ICI → CKD Cohort Study
text:
Data privacy
Patient-level identifiers (EMPI, MRN, names, dates of birth) never appear in any rendered output. Rendered tables and plots contain only aggregate summaries well above the small-cell threshold; all cell counts shown are institutional-level cohort statistics.
Raw RPDR extracts and clinical Excel files remain local — only the rendered code and aggregate results are published here.

title: Kavita ICI CKD — Data Management
text:
NoteAbout this page



This page is a summary of the data management pipeline. Code is hidden across the site and chunks are not executed at render time — they would load RPDR extracts and patient-level data which stay local. The cleaned output (final_master_0114_raw.xlsx + aki_0120.xlsx) is produced locally and feeds analysis.qmd.

title: Kavita ICI CKD — Data Management
text:
Pipeline overview








Stage
Inputs
Output




1. Demographics & cohort
ICI starts registry + RPDR Dem
Race, Ethnic_Group, sex, last-known-alive date


2. Pre-baseline labs (within 180 days of ICI)
RPDR Lab
pre_CRE_180days, pre_HGB_180days, pre_ALB_180days


3. Baseline eGFR
Pre-baseline CRE + age + sex
eGFR_cre via CKD-EPI 2021 race-free formula


4. Comorbidities & medications on/before ICI
RPDR Dia + Med
dm, htn, cad, cirrhosis, esrd_kt, ppi, ace_arb, diu, steroids, smoking


5. Post-ICI CKD outcomes
Serial CRE after baseline + CKD-EPI
ckd_incidence, ckd_progression, eskd_defination_1 (each with 90-day persistence rule)


6. ESRD / KT after ICI
RPDR Dia (post-ICI date)
esrd_kt_after_ici, esrd_kt_after_ici_date


7. Cohort exclusions

ICI date < 2024-03-31; baseline CRE exists; no pre-existing ESRD/KT; baseline eGFR ≥ 10; no RPDR death-date errors


8. ICI class & companion chemo (±30 days of ICI)
RPDR Med
ICI_Class (PD1/PDL1/CTLA4/Combination), Bevacizumab, Cisplatin, Carboplatin, Pemetrexed, Gemcitabine, Cetuximab, Trastuzumab, VEGF_TKI, nephrotoxic_chemo


9. AKI from serial CRE
RPDR Lab (post-ICI CRE)
aki, aki_date, aki_days using KDIGO-style rules (CRE > 1.5× median-90d OR +0.3 over lowest-2d)


10. Composite outcomes & competing-risk status
All outcomes + death
eskd_composite, ckd_composite, status_ckd_cmp (Censored / CKD / Death), time_to_ckd_cmp


11. Yearly eGFR & CKD stage (1–10 years)
Yearly median CRE per patient
eGFR_CRE_1year…10year, ckd_stage_1year…10year

title: Kavita ICI CKD — Data Management
text:
Key method decisions

eGFR formula — CKD-EPI 2021 race-free creatinine-based equation for all eGFR calculations (baseline, yearly, pre/post-event).
Outcome definitions — CKD events require the defining condition to hold for ≥ 90 days (persistence rule) before being counted, to exclude transient dips.
AKI — post-ICI creatinine compared to both a 90-day pre-window median (KDIGO 1.5× criterion) and a 2-day pre-window minimum (+0.3 mg/dL criterion).
Competing risk — death is modeled as a competing event to CKD composite. Patients who die before any CKD event contribute to the Death stratum of status_ckd_cmp.
Pre-index windows — all baseline covariates (medications, diagnoses, labs) are restricted to dates on or before ICI_Dose_Date to prevent temporal leakage.

text:
3.2 ckd_epi_gfr (race-free 2021 CKD-EPI)


Show code
ckd_epi_gfr <- function(creat, male, age) {
  k <- ifelse(male == 1, 0.9, 0.7)
  a <- ifelse(male == 1, -0.302, -0.241)
  m <- ifelse(male == 1, 1, 1.012)
  gfr <- 142 * min(c(creat/k, 1))^a *
               max(c(creat/k, 1))^-1.2 *
               0.9938^age * m
  return(gfr)
}
gfr_calc <- Vectorize(ckd_epi_gfr)

text:
3.4 pre_lab — closest lab on or before index date


Show code
pre_lab <- function(data, month, time, index_date, Group_Id) {
  index_date <- enquo(index_date)
  time_value <- if (month) time * 30 else time

  lab_name      <- paste0("pre_", Group_Id, "_", time_value, "days")
  lab_date_name <- paste0("pre_", Group_Id, "_", time_value, "days_date")

  data %>%
    filter(Group_Id == !!Group_Id, grepl("^\\d+\\.\\d+$", Result)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Result)) %>%
    mutate(Result = as.numeric(Result)) %>%
    filter(Seq_Date_Time >= (!!index_date) - time_value,
           Seq_Date_Time <=  !!index_date) %>%
    arrange(EMPI, desc(Seq_Date_Time)) %>%
    distinct(EMPI, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    rename(!!lab_name      := Result,
           !!lab_date_name := Seq_Date_Time) %>%
    select(EMPI, !!lab_name, !!lab_date_name)
}

text:
3.7 make_ckd_outcome_date — sustained-episode outcomes
Identifies the first episode where a condition (e.g., eGFR < 60) is sustained for ≥ days_threshold days and returns both the binary flag and first-event date.


Show code
make_ckd_outcome_date <- function(data, id_var, date_var, condition_expr,
                                  days_threshold = 90, outcome_name = "default") {
  id_var      <- enquo(id_var)
  date_var    <- enquo(date_var)
  cond_q      <- enquo(condition_expr)
  outcome_sym <- ensym(outcome_name)
  outcome_date_name <- paste0(outcome_name, "_date")

  working <- data %>%
    arrange(!!id_var, !!date_var) %>%
    group_by(!!id_var) %>%
    mutate(
      .cond   = if_else(!!cond_q, 1L, 0L),
      .change = .cond != lag(.cond, default = first(.cond)),
      .run    = cumsum(.change)
    )

  episodes <- working %>%
    group_by(!!id_var, .run) %>%
    summarise(.code = first(.cond),
              .start = first(!!date_var),
              .last  = last(!!date_var),
              .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(!!id_var) %>%
    mutate(.end  = lead(.start),
           .end  = if_else(is.na(.end), .last, .end),
           .days = as.integer(.end - .start)) %>%
    ungroup()

  episodes %>%
    group_by(!!id_var) %>%
    summarise(
      has_event  = any(.code == 1L & .days >= days_threshold),
      event_date = if (any(.code == 1L & .days >= days_threshold))
                      min(.start[.code == 1L & .days >= days_threshold])
                   else as.Date(NA),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(!!outcome_sym := as.integer(has_event)) %>%
    rename(!!outcome_date_name := event_date) %>%
    select(-has_event)
}

section: 3.8 create_aki — KDIGO-style AKI from serial CRE
text:
3.8 create_aki — KDIGO-style AKI from serial CRE


Show code
create_aki <- function(data,
                       index_date = ICI_Dose_Date,
                       Group_Id   = EMPI,
                       median_window_days = 90,
                       lowest_window_days = 2) {
  index_date <- enquo(index_date)
  Group_Id   <- enquo(Group_Id)

  df <- data %>%
    filter(Group_Id == "CRE", grepl("^\\d+\\.\\d+$", Result)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Result)) %>%
    mutate(Result = as.numeric(Result)) %>%
    rename(cre_date = Seq_Date_Time, cre = Result) %>%
    select(EMPI, cre, cre_date, !!index_date) %>%
    arrange(!!Group_Id, cre_date)

  df %>%
    filter(cre_date > !!index_date) %>%
    group_by(!!Group_Id) %>%
    mutate(
      median_cre_90days = sapply(seq_along(cre), function(i) {
        vals <- cre[cre_date >= cre_date[i] - median_window_days &
                    cre_date <= cre_date[i] - 1]
        if (length(vals) == 0) NA_real_ else median(vals, na.rm = TRUE)
      }),
      lowest_cre_2days = sapply(seq_along(cre), function(i) {
        vals <- cre[cre_date >= cre_date[i] - lowest_window_days &
                    cre_date <= cre_date[i] - 1]
        if (length(vals) == 0) NA_real_ else min(vals, na.rm = TRUE)
      }),
      aki_flag = (!is.na(median_cre_90days) & cre > 1.5 * median_cre_90days) |
                 (!is.na(lowest_cre_2days)  & cre - lowest_cre_2days >= 0.3)
    ) %>%
    filter(aki_flag) %>%
    arrange(!!Group_Id, cre_date) %>%
    summarise(aki      = 1L,
              aki_date = min(cre_date), .groups = "drop")
}

title: Kavita ICI CKD — Data Management
text:
5.5 Fold comorbidities into master


Show code
all_dem <- sqldf("
  select distinct master.EMPI,
         case when diu.EMPI      is not null then 1 else 0 end as diu,
         case when ace_arb.EMPI  is not null then 1 else 0 end as ace_arb,
         case when esrd_kt.EMPI  is not null then 1 else 0 end as esrd_kt,
         case when dm.EMPI       is not null then 1 else 0 end as dm,
         case when htn.EMPI      is not null then 1 else 0 end as htn,
         case when ppi.EMPI      is not null then 1 else 0 end as ppi,
         case when steroids.EMPI is not null then 1 else 0 end as steroids,
         case when smoking.EMPI  is not null then 1 else 0 end as smoking,
         case when cad.EMPI      is not null then 1 else 0 end as cad
  from master
    left join diu      on diu.EMPI      = master.EMPI
    left join dm       on dm.EMPI       = master.EMPI
    left join ace_arb  on ace_arb.EMPI  = master.EMPI
    left join esrd_kt  on esrd_kt.EMPI  = master.EMPI
    left join htn      on htn.EMPI      = master.EMPI
    left join steroids on steroids.EMPI = master.EMPI
    left join cad      on cad.EMPI      = master.EMPI
    left join smoking  on smoking.EMPI  = master.EMPI
    left join ppi      on ppi.EMPI      = master.EMPI
")

section: 5.7 Longitudinal CRE after baseline & CKD outcomes
text:
5.7 Longitudinal CRE after baseline & CKD outcomes


Show code
master_lab_with_cre <- master_lab %>%
  merge(all_outcome_lab_dem %>%
          select(EMPI, male, age, pre_CRE_180days, pre_CRE_180days_date),
        by = "EMPI", all.x = TRUE)

master_lab_cre_after_baseline <- master_lab_with_cre %>%
  filter(Group_Id == "CRE", grepl("^\\d+\\.\\d+$", Result)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Result)) %>%
  mutate(Result = as.numeric(Result)) %>%
  filter(Seq_Date_Time > pre_CRE_180days_date)

master_lab_cre_after_baseline$eGFR_CRE_baseline <-
  mapply(gfr_calc,
         master_lab_cre_after_baseline$pre_CRE_180days,
         master_lab_cre_after_baseline$male,
         master_lab_cre_after_baseline$age)

master_lab_cre_after_baseline <- master_lab_cre_after_baseline %>%
  rename(cre = Result, cre_date = Seq_Date_Time)

master_lab_cre_after_baseline$eGFR_CRE <-
  mapply(gfr_calc, master_lab_cre_after_baseline$cre,
         master_lab_cre_after_baseline$male,
         master_lab_cre_after_baseline$age)

master_lab_cre_after_baseline <- master_lab_cre_after_baseline %>%
  rename(eGFR_CRE_date         = cre_date,
         eGFR_CRE_baseline_date = pre_CRE_180days_date)

test <- master_lab_cre_after_baseline %>%
  select(EMPI, eGFR_CRE_baseline, eGFR_CRE_baseline_date,
         eGFR_CRE, eGFR_CRE_date) %>%
  mutate(pct_drop = round((eGFR_CRE_baseline - eGFR_CRE) / eGFR_CRE_baseline, 3)) %>%
  arrange(EMPI, eGFR_CRE_date)

ckd_incidence <- make_ckd_outcome_date(
  data = test, id_var = EMPI, date_var = eGFR_CRE_date,
  condition_expr = pct_drop > 0.30 & eGFR_CRE < 60 & eGFR_CRE_baseline >= 60,
  days_threshold = 90, outcome_name = "ckd_incidence")

eskd_defination_1 <- make_ckd_outcome_date(
  data = test, id_var = EMPI, date_var = eGFR_CRE_date,
  condition_expr = eGFR_CRE < 10,
  days_threshold = 90, outcome_name = "eskd_defination_1")

ckd_progression <- make_ckd_outcome_date(
  data = test, id_var = EMPI, date_var = eGFR_CRE_date,
  condition_expr = eGFR_CRE < 60 & eGFR_CRE_baseline < 60,
  days_threshold = 90, outcome_name = "ckd_progression")

master_med_window <- med %>%
  merge(final_master %>% select(EMPI, ICI_Dose_Date), by = "EMPI")

med_list_window <- function(names, index_date, data) {
  data %>%
    filter(Medication_Date >= {{index_date}} - 30,
           Medication_Date <= {{index_date}} + 30) %>%
    filter(grepl(paste(names, collapse = "|"), Medication, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
    distinct(EMPI)
}

Bevacizumab  <- med_list_window(c("Bevacizumab","Avastin"),           ICI_Dose_Date, master_med_window)
Cisplatin    <- med_list_window(c("Cisplatin"),                        ICI_Dose_Date, master_med_window)
Carboplatin  <- med_list_window(c("Carboplatin"),                      ICI_Dose_Date, master_med_window)
Pemetrexed   <- med_list_window(c("Pemetrexed","Alimta"),              ICI_Dose_Date, master_med_window)
Gemcitabine  <- med_list_window(c("Gemcitabine","Gemzar"),             ICI_Dose_Date, master_med_window)
Cetuximab    <- med_list_window(c("Cetuximab","Erbitux"),              ICI_Dose_Date, master_med_window)
Trastuzumab  <- med_list_window(c("Trastuzumab","Herceptin"),          ICI_Dose_Date, master_med_window)
VEGF_TKI     <- med_list_window(c("Sunitinib","Sutent","Sorafenib","Nexavar","Pazopanib",
                                   "Votrient","Axitinib","Inlyta","Lenvatinib","Lenvima",
                                   "Cabozantinib","Cabometyx","Cometriq","Regorafenib",
                                   "Stivarga","Tivozanib","Fotivda"),
                                 ICI_Dose_Date, master_med_window)

final_master <- final_master %>% rename(age_ici = age)

final_master <- sqldf("
  select distinct final_master.*,
         case when Bevacizumab.EMPI is not null then 1 else 0 end as Bevacizumab,
         case when Cisplatin.EMPI   is not null then 1 else 0 end as Cisplatin,
         case when Carboplatin.EMPI is not null then 1 else 0 end as Carboplatin,
         case when Pemetrexed.EMPI  is not null then 1 else 0 end as Pemetrexed,
         case when Gemcitabine.EMPI is not null then 1 else 0 end as Gemcitabine,
         case when Cetuximab.EMPI   is not null then 1 else 0 end as Cetuximab,
         case when Trastuzumab.EMPI is not null then 1 else 0 end as Trastuzumab,
         case when VEGF_TKI.EMPI    is not null then 1 else 0 end as VEGF_TKI
  from final_master
    left join Bevacizumab on Bevacizumab.EMPI = final_master.EMPI
    left join Cisplatin   on Cisplatin.EMPI   = final_master.EMPI
    left join Carboplatin on Carboplatin.EMPI = final_master.EMPI
    left join Pemetrexed  on Pemetrexed.EMPI  = final_master.EMPI
    left join Gemcitabine on Gemcitabine.EMPI = final_master.EMPI
    left join Cetuximab   on Cetuximab.EMPI   = final_master.EMPI
    left join Trastuzumab on Trastuzumab.EMPI = final_master.EMPI
    left join VEGF_TKI    on VEGF_TKI.EMPI    = final_master.EMPI
")

5.14 Composite outcomes & time variables


Show code
final_master <- final_master %>%
  mutate(
    eskd_composite       = ifelse(esrd_kt_after_ici == 1 | eskd_defination_1 == 1, 1, 0),
    eskd_composite       = ifelse(is.na(eskd_composite), 0, eskd_composite),
    eskd_composite_date  = pmin(esrd_kt_after_ici_date, eskd_defination_1_date, na.rm = TRUE),
    time_to_eskd_composite  = as.numeric(eskd_composite_date  - ICI_Dose_Date),
    time_to_ckd_incidence   = as.numeric(ckd_incidence_date   - ICI_Dose_Date),
    time_to_ckd_progression = as.numeric(ckd_progression_date - ICI_Dose_Date),

    ckd_composite = ifelse(eskd_composite == 1 | ckd_incidence == 1 |
                           ckd_progression == 1, 1, 0),
    ckd_composite = ifelse(is.na(ckd_composite), 0, ckd_composite),
    time_to_ckd_composite = pmin(time_to_eskd_composite,
                                 time_to_ckd_incidence,
                                 time_to_ckd_progression, na.rm = TRUE),

    last_cre_days          = as.numeric(last_cre_date - ICI_Dose_Date),
    death_days             = as.numeric(Date_Of_Death - ICI_Dose_Date),
    time_to_death          = death_days,
    time_to_death_status   = ifelse(!is.na(death_days), 2, 0)

title: Kavita ICI CKD — Data Management
text:
5.15 Competing-risk status (CKD Composite vs Death)


Show code
final_master <- final_master %>%
  mutate(
    status_ckd_cmp = case_when(
      (ckd_composite == 1) & (time_to_death_status == 2) ~
        ifelse(time_to_ckd_composite < time_to_death, 1, 2),
      (ckd_composite == 1 & time_to_death_status == 0)   ~ 1,
      (ckd_composite == 0 & time_to_death_status == 2)   ~ 2,
      TRUE                                                ~ 0
    ),
    time_to_ckd_cmp = case_when(
      status_ckd_cmp == 1 ~ time_to_ckd_composite,
      status_ckd_cmp == 2 ~ time_to_death,
      status_ckd_cmp == 0 ~ last_cre_days
    ),
    status_ckd_cmp = factor(status_ckd_cmp, levels = c(0, 1, 2),
                            labels = c("Censored", "CKD Composite", "Death")),
    time_to_ckd_cmp_year = time_to_ckd_cmp / 365,
    status_ckd_csh       = ifelse(status_ckd_cmp == "CKD Composite", 1, 0)
  )

final_master <- final_master %>%
  mutate(aki_before_ckd = if_else(aki_days <= time_to_ckd_composite, 1, 0))

title: Kavita ICI CKD — Data Management
section: 5.17 Yearly median creatinine → yearly eGFR → yearly CKD stage
text:
5.17 Yearly median creatinine → yearly eGFR → yearly CKD stage
Compute the per-patient median CRE within each 365-day window after ICI, then derive eGFR and CKD stage at each year.


Show code
yearly_cre <- master_lab %>%
  filter(Group_Id == "CRE", grepl("^\\d+\\.\\d+$", Result)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Result)) %>%
  mutate(
    Result         = as.numeric(Result),
    days_since_ici = as.numeric(Seq_Date_Time - ICI_Dose_Date),
    year_bucket    = ceiling(days_since_ici / 365)
  ) %>%
  filter(year_bucket >= 1, year_bucket <= 10) %>%
  group_by(EMPI, year_bucket) %>%
  summarise(median_cre = median(Result, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = year_bucket,
    values_from = median_cre,
    names_glue  = "pre_mdeian_CRE_{year_bucket}year"
  )

# Guarantee all 10 columns exist even if no patient has labs in that year
needed_yearly_cols <- paste0("pre_mdeian_CRE_", 1:10, "year")
for (col in setdiff(needed_yearly_cols, names(yearly_cre))) {
  yearly_cre[[col]] <- NA_real_
}

final_master <- final_master %>% merge(yearly_cre, by = "EMPI", all.x = TRUE)




Show code
for (y in 1:10) {
  col_cre  <- paste0("pre_mdeian_CRE_", y, "year")
  col_egfr <- paste0("eGFR_CRE_",       y, "year")
  final_master[[col_egfr]] <- mapply(gfr_calc,
                                     final_master[[col_cre]],
                                     final_master$male,
                                     final_master$age_ici)
}

# Fill eGFR at each year with baseline if missing
final_master <- final_master %>%
  mutate(across(any_of(paste0("eGFR_CRE_", 1:10, "year")),
                ~ coalesce(., eGFR_CRE_baseline)))

# Numeric CKD stage from eGFR
final_master$ckd_stage_baseline <- sapply(final_master$eGFR_CRE_baseline, get_ckd_stage)
for (y in 1:10) {
  col_egfr  <- paste0("eGFR_CRE_", y, "year")
  col_stage <- paste0("ckd_stage_", y, "year")
  final_master[[col_stage]] <- sapply(final_master[[col_egfr]], get_ckd_stage)
}

title: Kavita ICI CKD — Data Management
section: 5.17 Per-10-unit decrease scaling & year-level outcome flags
text:
5.17 Per-10-unit decrease scaling & year-level outcome flags


Show code
final_master <- final_master %>%
  mutate(
    year_10                        = age_ici / 10,
    eGFR_CRE_baseline_decrease_10  = (eGFR_CRE_baseline * -1) / 10
  )

for (y in 1:10) {
  col_egfr <- paste0("eGFR_CRE_",            y, "year")
  col_dec  <- paste0("eGFR_CRE_",            y, "year_decrease_10")
  final_master[[col_dec]] <- (final_master[[col_egfr]] * -1) / 10
}

cutoffs <- 1:10
for (y in cutoffs) {
  d <- 365 * y
  final_master[[paste0("eskd_composite_",    y, "year")]] <- ifelse(final_master$time_to_eskd_composite   < d, 1, 0)
  final_master[[paste0("ckd_incidence_",     y, "year")]] <- ifelse(final_master$time_to_ckd_incidence    < d, 1, 0)
  final_master[[paste0("ckd_progression_",   y, "year")]] <- ifelse(final_master$time_to_ckd_progression  < d, 1, 0)
  final_master[[paste0("ckd_composite_",     y, "year")]] <- ifelse(final_master$time_to_ckd_composite    < d, 1, 0)
}

final_master <- final_master %>%
  mutate(across(matches("(ckd_incidence|ckd_progression|eskd_composite|ckd_composite).*year$"),
                ~ replace_na(., 0))) %>%
  mutate(across(matches("(ckd_incidence|ckd_progression|eskd_composite).*year$"),
                ~ factor(replace_na(., 0))))
